MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-21-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Prince Hall Apartments, is present. Represented by
Attorney, Charles Ramsey, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Janice White, is present.
Attorney, Misti Schmidt, representing the defendant through limited scope.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem Andy Westley, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed in 305B.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-25-2010 is vacated.
